forbidden_files_raw: No product code, no landing, no Slack/OAuth/API/send work, no Stripe, no dashboard product behavior, no schema changes, no issue #131 implementation, no Supabase downgrade, no broad cleanup.

no product code, landing, Slack, Stripe, dashboard, schema, downgrade, or broad cleanup files are in scope
